claim: Repository baseline matches expected starting head for this task.
basis: git rev-parse HEAD returned 60945b48b474026391f6d6ae75947cc9e1e23f89 and equals taskpack expected start.
risk: Wrong baseline would invalidate state lineage assumptions.
proof_plan: Run git truth commands before any edits and compare to taskpack start hash.
result: HEAD/branch/remote master are aligned and worktree started clean.

claim: Taskpack was not used as role authority; Officio/Doctrinarium authority was read from repository.
basis: Officio and Doctrinarium authority files were read and ACK artifacts created in report bundle.
risk: Role/law drift if taskpack-only authority were used.
proof_plan: Read canonical role/law files and emit OFFICIO/DOCTRINARIUM/SUPER_SKEPTICISM ACK artifacts.
result: ACK artifacts were written with limitations and warnings explicitly documented.

claim: Implementation scope is bounded to allowed Visual Brain foundation paths.
basis: 02_TASK_SPEC.machine.json allowed_write_paths and GATE_ACK scope boundary list.
risk: Out-of-scope write could violate gate laws and invalidate closure.
proof_plan: Create files only in allowed architecture/contracts/visual_brain/tools/reports paths.
result: All planned file targets are inside allowed scope.

claim: Visual Brain state contract can encode no-fake-green constraints for static corridor rendering.
basis: Task dossier requires truth-bound statuses, warnings, forbidden claims, and evidence binding fields.
risk: Schema may permit ambiguous green states without receipts.
proof_plan: Define schema with required truth fields and include status/evidence requirements.
result: Schema and sample contract created under CONTRACTS/VISUAL_BRAIN.

claim: Deterministic builder and validator can generate/check static corridor state without external installs.
basis: Task gate explicitly requires local python builder+validator and forbids external tooling.
risk: Missing upstream records could produce fake-green data.
proof_plan: Implement explicit source status markers and validator checks for evidence-backed green states.
result: Builder and validator scripts were created in allowed tool paths.

claim: Visual Brain state generation and validation can pass with truth-bound no-fake-green constraints.
basis: Builder generated visual_brain_task_corridor_state.generated.json and validator produced PASS in VALIDATOR_REPORT.json.
risk: PASS could be overstated if state allowed green without evidence or external dependencies.
proof_plan: Run builder then validator; inspect verdict, blocker list, and no-fake-green/local-only checks.
result: Builder executed successfully (12 nodes / 5 evidence items); validator verdict is PASS with zero blockers/warnings.
